What We Offer

FOR EVERY
JOURNEY

Whether you're a tourist, local commuter, or a ride-sharing driver — we've got you covered.

🛵
Ride Sharing Partners
Earn money by renting our bikes & scooters for ride-sharing apps. We provide well-maintained vehicles so you can focus on earning.
inDrive Pathao Yango Tootle Mero Ride
🏔️
Tourist & Travel Rental
Explore Kathmandu, Pashupatinath, Swayambhunath, Boudhanath and beyond on your own schedule. Hourly, daily, and weekly packages available.
🏙️
Local Daily Rental
Need a bike for work, school, or errands? Affordable daily and weekly rates for locals. Convenient location in the city.
7
VEHICLES
AVAILABLE

Why Choose Us

NEPAL'S
TRUSTED
RENTAL

✅

All Vehicles Verified & Insured

Every vehicle in our fleet is properly registered, insured, and maintained. Ride with peace of mind.

⚡

Instant WhatsApp Booking

No complex forms. Just message us on WhatsApp and your bike is ready within minutes.

🪖

Helmets Included

Safety first. Full-face helmets provided with every rental — for both rider and pillion.

💰

Best Price in Kathmandu

Competitive daily rates with flexible hourly options. No hidden charges, transparent pricing.

Simple Process

HOW IT
WORKS

1

Contact Us

Message us on WhatsApp at +977 9763468681 or visit our shop in Jarankhu, Kathmandu.

2

Choose Your Ride

Pick from our 7 vehicles — scooters, bikes, or car — based on your needs and budget.

3

Quick Verification

Show your ID/driving license. Simple, fast verification — no lengthy paperwork.

4

Hit The Road!

Pick up your ride, grab a helmet, and explore Nepal your way. Namaste! 🙏

WHAT RIDERS
SAY ABOUT US

Real experiences from our happy customers across Nepal.
